status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Established by GDPR itself (secid:regulation/europa.eu/gdpr, Articles 68-76). EU body with legal personality composed of the heads of all national Data Protection Authorities plus the European Data Protection Supervisor. Issues binding decisions in cross-border DPA disputes (Art. 65), formal opinions (Art. 64), and guidelines/recommendations to ensure consistent GDPR application across the EU/EEA.
